summary: Completed testing of Battle Achievements & Badges (10-Win Streak Medal) feature. All 16 backend API tests pass. Fixed frontend medal display issue in PhotoGameArena.jsx - medals now show correctly next to photo names (🏅x{count}).

fixed_issues.issue: Medal display (🏅x{count}) was missing in Practice Mode photo selection
fixed_issues.fix: Added medal display span after photo name in PhotoSelectionScreen component

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'button cannot be a descendant of button' - There's a nested button issue in PhotoGameArena.jsx where a view full image button is inside a motion.button. This is a hydration warning but doesn't break functionality.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user with minted photos.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Medal system fully functional. Golden Hour has 4 medals (🏅x4), Mountain Peak has 1 medal (🏅x1). Medal display shows next to photo name in Practice Mode photo selection. Toast notification for medal earned is implemented in BattleArena.jsx handleRoundComplete function.

backend_apis: POST /api/photo-game/record-round-result - Records win/loss and awards medals at 10-win streak
medal_logic: Medal earned at exactly 10 consecutive wins
Medals are permanent (don't decrease after loss)
Multiple medals can be earned (at 10, 20, 30 wins etc)
frontend_components: PhotoGameArena.jsx - Medal display (🏅x{count}) next to photo name - FIXED
BattleArena.jsx - Toast notification on medal earned
